vocab.meaning: một lựa chọn về thời trang/cách ăn mặc
vocab.example: Opting for minimalist sneakers is more of a sartorial choice that complements almost any outfit I own.
I value versatility in footwear, which is why I prefer loafers that transition easily from office wear to casual outings.

vocab.meaning: sự êm ái và hỗ trợ (nâng đỡ bàn chân)
vocab.example: High-end running shoes provide excellent cushioning and support, which is essential for my daily jogs.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn (thay vì một thứ khác)
vocab.example: On formal occasions, I usually opt for leather brogues to maintain a professional and polished appearance.
During the sweltering summer months, I lean towards shoes made of breathable material to keep my feet cool.
When investing in boots, durability is my top priority as I need them to withstand harsh weather conditions.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thẩm mỹ, sự lôi cuốn về ngoại hình
vocab.example: Beyond comfort, the aesthetic appeal of limited-edition sneakers is what really draws me in.

vocab.meaning: được thiết kế theo công thái học (vừa vặn, thoải mái)
vocab.example: I prefer shoes that are ergonomically designed to prevent foot fatigue during long commutes.
Vintage-style trainers are all the rage right now, and I must admit I’ve jumped on the bandwagon.
For hiking, I require footwear with a sturdy sole to provide adequate grip on uneven terrain.
